testcase.name: test_wrong_password_fails

failure.message: apps.authentication.exceptions.InvalidCredentialsError: Invalid credentials. Please check your email/phone and password and try again.

testcase.failure: apps\authentication\tests\unit\test_serializers.py:216: in test_wrong_password_fails assert not s.is_valid() ^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv\Lib\site-packages\rest_framework\serializers.py:225: in is_valid self._validated_data = self.run_validation(self.initial_data) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv\Lib\site-packages\rest_framework\serializers.py:447: in run_validation value = self.validate(value) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ apps\authentication\serializers\auth.py:143: in validate raise InvalidCredentialsError() E apps.authentication.exceptions.InvalidCredentialsError: Invalid credentials. Please check your email/phone and password and try again.

testcase.name: test_non_existent_user_fails

failure.message: apps.authentication.exceptions.InvalidCredentialsError: Invalid credentials. Please check your email/phone and password and try again.

testcase.failure: apps\authentication\tests\unit\test_serializers.py:224: in test_non_existent_user_fails assert not s.is_valid() ^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv\Lib\site-packages\rest_framework\serializers.py:225: in is_valid self._validated_data = self.run_validation(self.initial_data) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv\Lib\site-packages\rest_framework\serializers.py:447: in run_validation value = self.validate(value) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ apps\authentication\serializers\auth.py:136: in validate raise InvalidCredentialsError() E apps.authentication.exceptions.InvalidCredentialsError: Invalid credentials. Please check your email/phone and password and try again.

testcase.name: test_inactive_user_cannot_login

failure.message: apps.authentication.exceptions.AccountNotVerifiedError: Your account has not been verified yet. Please check your email or phone for the OTP code we sent during registration. Verify your account here: http://fashionistar.net/verify-otp — or request a new code here: http://fashionistar.net/resend-otp

testcase.failure: apps\authentication\tests\unit\test_serializers.py:232: in test_inactive_user_cannot_login assert not s.is_valid() ^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv\Lib\site-packages\rest_framework\serializers.py:225: in is_valid self._validated_data = self.run_validation(self.initial_data) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv\Lib\site-packages\rest_framework\serializers.py:447: in run_validation value = self.validate(value) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ apps\authentication\serializers\auth.py:150: in validate raise AccountNotVerifiedError() E apps.authentication.exceptions.AccountNotVerifiedError: Your account has not been verified yet. Please check your email or phone for the OTP code we sent during registration. Verify your account here: http://fashionistar.net/verify-otp — or request a new code here: http://fashionistar.net/resend-otp

testcase.name: test_valid_email_payload_passes

failure.message:
AssertionError: {'non_field_errors': [ErrorDetail(string='An error occurred during validation.', code='invalid')]} assert False + where False = is_valid() + where is_valid = UserRegistrationSerializer(data={'email': 'valid@fashionistar-test.io', 'password': 'SecurePass123!', 'password2': 'SecurePass123!', 'role': 'client'}):
 email = EmailField(allow_blank=True, help_text="User's email address", required=False)
 phone = PhoneNumberField(allow_blank=True, help_text="User's phone number", required=False)
 role = ChoiceField(choices=[('vendor', 'Vendor'), ('client', 'Client')], help_text="User's role: 'vendor' or 'client'")
 password = CharField(help_text="User's password", required=True, style={'input_type': 'password'}, validators=[<function validate_password>], write_only=True)
 password2 = CharField(help_text="Confirm user's password", required=True, style={'input_type': 'password'}, write_only=True).is_valid

testcase.failure:
apps\authentication	ests\unit	est_serializers.py:63: in test_valid_email_payload_passes assert s.is_valid(), s.errors E AssertionError: {'non_field_errors': [ErrorDetail(string='An error occurred during validation.', code='invalid')]} E assert False E + where False = is_valid() E + where is_valid = UserRegistrationSerializer(data={'email': 'valid@fashionistar-test.io', 'password': 'SecurePass123!', 'password2': 'SecurePass123!', 'role': 'client'}):
 email = EmailField(allow_blank=True, help_text="User's email address", required=False)
 phone = PhoneNumberField(allow_blank=True, help_text="User's phone number", required=False)
 role = ChoiceField(choices=[('vendor', 'Vendor'), ('client', 'Client')], help_text="User's role: 'vendor' or 'client'")
 password = CharField(help_text="User's password", required=True, style={'input_type': 'password'}, validators=[<function validate_password>], write_only=True)
 password2 = CharField(help_text="Confirm user's password", required=True, style={'input_type': 'password'}, write_only=True).is_valid

testcase.name: test_vendor_role_accepted

failure.message:
AssertionError: {'non_field_errors': [ErrorDetail(string='An error occurred during validation.', code='invalid')]} assert False + where False = is_valid() + where is_valid = UserRegistrationSerializer(data={'email': 'vendor@test.io', 'password': 'SecurePass123!', 'password2': 'SecurePass123!', 'role': 'vendor'}):
 email = EmailField(allow_blank=True, help_text="User's email address", required=False)
 phone = PhoneNumberField(allow_blank=True, help_text="User's phone number", required=False)
 role = ChoiceField(choices=[('vendor', 'Vendor'), ('client', 'Client')], help_text="User's role: 'vendor' or 'client'")
 password = CharField(help_text="User's password", required=True, style={'input_type': 'password'}, validators=[<function validate_password>], write_only=True)
 password2 = CharField(help_text="Confirm user's password", required=True, style={'input_type': 'password'}, write_only=True).is_valid

testcase.failure:
apps\authentication	ests\unit	est_serializers.py:130: in test_vendor_role_accepted assert s.is_valid(), s.errors E AssertionError: {'non_field_errors': [ErrorDetail(string='An error occurred during validation.', code='invalid')]} E assert False E + where False = is_valid() E + where is_valid = UserRegistrationSerializer(data={'email': 'vendor@test.io', 'password': 'SecurePass123!', 'password2': 'SecurePass123!', 'role': 'vendor'}):
 email = EmailField(allow_blank=True, help_text="User's email address", required=False)
 phone = PhoneNumberField(allow_blank=True, help_text="User's phone number", required=False)
 role = ChoiceField(choices=[('vendor', 'Vendor'), ('client', 'Client')], help_text="User's role: 'vendor' or 'client'")
 password = CharField(help_text="User's password", required=True, style={'input_type': 'password'}, validators=[<function validate_password>], write_only=True)
 password2 = CharField(help_text="Confirm user's password", required=True, style={'input_type': 'password'}, write_only=True).is_valid

testcase.name: test_duplicate_email_returns_email_field_error

failure.message:
assert 'email' in {'non_field_errors': [ErrorDetail(string='An error occurred during validation.', code='invalid')]} + where {'non_field_errors': [ErrorDetail(string='An error occurred during validation.', code='invalid')]} = UserRegistrationSerializer(data={'email': 'dup@test.io', 'password': 'SecurePass123!', 'password2': 'SecurePass123!', 'role': 'client'}):
 email = EmailField(allow_blank=True, help_text="User's email address", required=False)
 phone = PhoneNumberField(allow_blank=True, help_text="User's phone number", required=False)
 role = ChoiceField(choices=[('vendor', 'Vendor'), ('client', 'Client')], help_text="User's role: 'vendor' or 'client'")
 password = CharField(help_text="User's password", required=True, style={'input_type': 'password'}, validators=[<function validate_password>], write_only=True)
 password2 = CharField(help_text="Confirm user's password", required=True, style={'input_type': 'password'}, write_only=True).errors

testcase.failure:
apps\authentication	ests\unit	est_serializers.py:145: in test_duplicate_email_returns_email_field_error assert 'email' in s.errors E assert 'email' in {'non_field_errors': [ErrorDetail(string='An error occurred during validation.', code='invalid')]} E + where {'non_field_errors': [ErrorDetail(string='An error occurred during validation.', code='invalid')]} = UserRegistrationSerializer(data={'email': 'dup@test.io', 'password': 'SecurePass123!', 'password2': 'SecurePass123!', 'role': 'client'}):
 email = EmailField(allow_blank=True, help_text="User's email address", required=False)
 phone = PhoneNumberField(allow_blank=True, help_text="User's phone number", required=False)
 role = ChoiceField(choices=[('vendor', 'Vendor'), ('client', 'Client')], help_text="User's role: 'vendor' or 'client'")
 password = CharField(help_text="User's password", required=True, style={'input_type': 'password'}, validators=[<function validate_password>], write_only=True)
 password2 = CharField(help_text="Confirm user's password", required=True, style={'input_type': 'password'}, write_only=True).errors

testcase.name: test_email_normalized_before_uniqueness_check

failure.message:
assert 'email' in {'non_field_errors': [ErrorDetail(string='An error occurred during validation.', code='invalid')]} + where {'non_field_errors': [ErrorDetail(string='An error occurred during validation.', code='invalid')]} = UserRegistrationSerializer(data={'email': 'user@EXAMPLE.COM', 'password': 'SecurePass123!', 'password2': 'SecurePass123!', 'role': 'client'}):
 email = EmailField(allow_blank=True, help_text="User's email address", required=False)
 phone = PhoneNumberField(allow_blank=True, help_text="User's phone number", required=False)
 role = ChoiceField(choices=[('vendor', 'Vendor'), ('client', 'Client')], help_text="User's role: 'vendor' or 'client'")
 password = CharField(help_text="User's password", required=True, style={'input_type': 'password'}, validators=[<function validate_password>], write_only=True)
 password2 = CharField(help_text="Confirm user's password", required=True, style={'input_type': 'password'}, write_only=True).errors

testcase.failure:
apps\authentication	ests\unit	est_serializers.py:164: in test_email_normalized_before_uniqueness_check assert 'email' in s.errors E assert 'email' in {'non_field_errors': [ErrorDetail(string='An error occurred during validation.', code='invalid')]} E + where {'non_field_errors': [ErrorDetail(string='An error occurred during validation.', code='invalid')]} = UserRegistrationSerializer(data={'email': 'user@EXAMPLE.COM', 'password': 'SecurePass123!', 'password2': 'SecurePass123!', 'role': 'client'}):
 email = EmailField(allow_blank=True, help_text="User's email address", required=False)
 phone = PhoneNumberField(allow_blank=True, help_text="User's phone number", required=False)
 role = ChoiceField(choices=[('vendor', 'Vendor'), ('client', 'Client')], help_text="User's role: 'vendor' or 'client'")
 password = CharField(help_text="User's password", required=True, style={'input_type': 'password'}, validators=[<function validate_password>], write_only=True)
 password2 = CharField(help_text="Confirm user's password", required=True, style={'input_type': 'password'}, write_only=True).errors
